should_fire.prompt: Estimate managed vs self-hosted cost for eight inspection streams.
Estimate annotation and training cost before we label another 2,000 images.
What is the economics of labeling, training, and deploying this CV workflow?
Give me the deployment crossover for running this CV model at scale.
I need a build-vs-buy decision for this computer vision deployment.

should_not_fire.prompt: I need to build a detector for damaged boxes from sample images.
Help me finish the PoC before we talk about deployment.
How do I use this pure platform feature on an already-working model?
The eval has not passed yet, but I want to keep improving the model.
